title: 67-mod
description: !This mod adds the legendary "67 Dance" to Minecraft, allowing you to hit those smooth, rhythmic steps anytime, anywhere.
body:
Project 67: The Ultimate Tactical Style
Are you tired of the same old boring animations in Minecraft? Project 67 is here to revolutionize your gameplay with legendary moves and tactical flair. Whether you want to celebrate a victory or aim with style, this mod has you covered.

Key Features
The Legendary 67 Dance
Forget complex commands. Unleash the legendary dance moves at any moment with just a single keystroke.

Instant Activation: Simply press [V] (default keybind) to start the animation.

Anytime, Anywhere: Perfect for celebrating after a boss fight or just vibing with friends on a server.
Tactical Bow67 (Exclusive Action)
Why settle for the vanilla aiming stance when you can have the Tactical Bow67?

The 6767-Arrow Action: By holding a bow during the animation, you unlock a unique, stylish aiming posture.

Style meets Function: It’s not just a dance; it's the most legendary way to show your enemies who's boss before you let the arrow fly.

Why Download Project 67?
Express Yourself: Standard Minecraft emotes are limited. Project 67 gives you a unique identity.

Visual Polish: Smooth animations that blend seamlessly into your gameplay.

Multiplayer Fun: Show off your "67 style" to other players and become the center of attention.

🛠 Technical Details
Keybindings: You can change the default [V] key in the standard Minecraft controls menu.

Requirements: Fabric api

Compatibility: Works best with standard player models.
